completed_tasks.name: Preview mechanism cleanup and explicit retrieval-path alignment
Field and hint convergence with noise reduction
Project-structure and code cleanup for the 1.3.x line
Final contract/catalog closeout and full verification

decisions.decision: Preview is advertised through previewPath and retrieved through /screenshot rather than inline /screen thumbnails.
decisions.rationale: This keeps preview lightweight and actually usable when advertised.

decisions.decision: 1.3.1 closeout contract alignment stays bounded to the runtime/catalog surface because docs/API.md is absent in this workspace.
decisions.rationale: Avoids turning closeout into a broader docs project.

decisions.decision: Release packaging is now arm-only via ndk abiFilters arm64-v8a and armeabi-v7a.
decisions.rationale: Drops x86/x86_64 permanently and reduces APK size from roughly 57 MB to roughly 34 MB.
User corrected the release version after the 1.3.1 branch had already been merged and synced.

next_action: Commit app/build.gradle.kts on main with versionCode=6, versionName=1.3.1, and arm-only abiFilters; then push main and optionally reinstall the rebuilt release APK to the OnePlus device.
context_notes: Phase 24.4 is complete and merged into main (HEAD e7cb0f4). The only remaining live work is the uncommitted release housekeeping change in app/build.gradle.kts: version bump to 1.3.1 (6) plus permanent removal of x86/x86_64 from the APK. Release was rebuilt successfully after that change and the size dropped to about 34 MB. This is not a new phase; it is post-phase release cleanup on main.
